caption: Melancholic piano ballad with sweeping orchestral strings, soft emotional female voice, intimate and cinematic, building to a powerful crescendo
lyrics:
[verse]
The photograph has faded now
Your smile still holds me somehow
The empty chair across the room
Still fills my heart with afternoon

[chorus]
I carry you in every breath
Beyond the reach of time and death
You are the light inside my grief
The anchor and the sweet relief

[verse]
The seasons change but I remain
Here in the warmth of your refrain
Your laughter echoes in the hall
I catch it before it falls

[chorus]
I carry you in every breath
Beyond the reach of time and death
You are the light inside my grief
The anchor and the sweet relief

[bridge]
And when the night grows cold and deep
Your memory keeps the dark from sleep
I'll hold you in this song forever
Distance could not keep us severed

[chorus]
I carry you in every breath
Beyond the reach of time and death
You are the light inside my grief
The anchor and the sweet relief

[outro]
Until we meet again someday
I'll love you always
Always
